subtitle.text: Having accumulated over four years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining websites, online systems, and mobile applications, I have worked with a wide range of technologies. My versatility has enabled me to tackle projects across various platforms and environments, always striving to provide high-quality and high-performance solutions

skills.description: With experience both as an employee and a freelancer, I have developed a well-rounded perspective on the industry and the flexibility to collaborate with diverse teams and projects. My focus on achieving results, combined with a strong passion for learning, has helped me excel in my career and drive successful outcomes. As a computer engineer, I consistently aimed for excellence in my programming courses, and my dedication is evident in the quality of my work and the satisfaction of those I work with.

archbishopric.description: As a web master developer at Archbishopric of La Serena, a prominent technology development company, I utilized my skills in React.js, Tailwind CSS, MySQL, to design, develop, and maintain high-quality web and mobile applications. I implemented innovative solutions, creating interactive and engaging interfaces with modern and scalable styles. Handling server logic and database management with Express and MySQL, I integrated payment services using WebPay and ensured optimal performance. At Archbishopric of La Serena, I actively participated in successful projects, demonstrating my ability to leverage modern technologies and contribute to the success of technological initiatives.

freelance.description: As a junior freelance developer, I designed and optimized web solutions for entrepreneurs and startups using technologies like React.js, Python, Node.js, and MongoDB, focusing on building efficient and scalable interfaces. I developed static sites with HTML/CSS and JavaScript, enhancing SEO and performance, and managed server logic while collaborating on applications such as a task manager, learning to troubleshoot real-time errors and communicate technical requirements clearly to clients. Every project, from e-commerce platforms to basic APIs, strengthened my adaptability and ability to deliver results with modern tools, even under tight deadlines and unexpected technical challenges.

arzobispado.title: Website & CRUD Archbishopric of La Serena
arzobispado.text: I updated and created a new website for the Archbishopric of La Serena along with an internal business system to create, read, update and delete various sections of the site including news for the institution's journalistic department.

worldker.title: Worldker Mobile App
worldker.text: An innovative on-demand mobile application designed to seamlessly connect professionals with service seekers. Built from the ground up, featuring real-time matching and a responsive UI/UX.

arzobispadoWeb.title: Archdiocese of La Serena
arzobispadoWeb.text: A comprehensive institutional website developed to provide news, resources, and transparent information to the community, featuring a highly accessible and responsive design.

arzobispadoCrud.title: Archdiocese Management System
arzobispadoCrud.text: A bespoke internal CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) system engineered to securely manage the institution's digital content, including journalistic articles and event scheduling.

alcaldia.title: Town Hall Medellin
alcaldia.text: A dedicated website designed to manage and organize cultural events in Medellin, featuring tailored roles for jurors and candidates to streamline the entire event process.

autovidrios.title: Auto Vidrios Pueblo Nuevo
autovidrios.text: A comprehensive web-based management system built to control appointments, track inventory, and conduct audits for employees, clients, and managers.

fiado.title: Fiado
fiado.text: A Progressive Web App (PWA) facilitating seamless money transfers between customized roles and managed internal contacts.

jccrp.title: Distribuciones J.C.C.R.P.c.a.
jccrp.text: A local web system developed for robust inventory control and the precise designation of delivery routes for products.

perfecttrainer.title: Perfect Trainer
perfecttrainer.text: A mobile application tailored for personal trainers, offering predefined or personalized exercise routines tailored to meet the specific needs of their clients.

tourtrack.title: TourTrack
tourtrack.text: A native mobile application that allows agencies to assign new tourist tours globally while efficiently managing their internal contact network.

contact.infoDesc: You can contact me directly through my email or LinkedIn.

footer.quote1: “The good thing about computers is that they do what you tell them to do.
footer.quote2: The bad news is that they do what you tell them to do.”
footer.author: – Ted Nelson
